titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Divinity School, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday May 14, 2020 at 09:36

did.abstract: The records consist of reports, minutes, lists, correspondence, subject files, daybooks, alumni records, student prize materials, and student data documenting the administrative operations of the Yale Divinity School.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 21-A (YRG 21-A), Central records and records of the dean of the Yale Divinity School.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Divinity School, Yale University, Records (RU 167). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of reports, minutes, lists, correspondence, subject files, daybooks, alumni records, student prize materials, and student data documenting the administrative operations of the Yale Divinity School.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Alumni Association records [also contains 1 page Records of Pastorate, Yale University]
Alumni Association Connecticut Branch, constitution, minutes, records
Alumni Class of 1887 correspondence and biographical material
Alumni Class of 1931 and reunion material
Annual Reports [from Theological Department and Faculty]
Biblical and Semitic Departments record of students and graduates
Education for Christian Service [by memebers of the faculty in commemoration of the school's 100th anniversary]
Examination Committees reports [examined students in the Theological Department]
Faculty resolutions to name endowed professorships
Faculty statements, letters to the Corporation, etc.
Lowell Mason Society constitution, membership list, minutes, records
Society for Christion Research [in the Theological Seminary] constitution, members list, minutes
Semitic and Biblical Club minutes and records
Students, geographical distribution of living former students
Students, biographical and demographic charts 6f students
Trowbridge Reference Library index book, donations
Hright, Henry Cottage records vol. I
Wright, Henry Cottage records vol. II
Students, biographical & demographic chart of students
